page_metadata.biotools__summary: It makes annotation of tandem repeats in amino acid and nucleic data simple. It includes modules for detecting tandem repeats with both de novo software and sequence profile HMMs; statistical significance analysis of putative tandem repeats, and filtering of redundant predictions.
